summary: Add Terminal as a fourth frontend theme inspired by blackglass terminal surfaces and cyan/mint neon controls.
assumptions: Terminal is a new fourth theme, not a replacement for dark, light, or purple.
The persisted value is terminal and the display name is Terminal.
Terminal keeps dark-mode base behavior by applying both data-theme="terminal" and the dark class.
risks: Toggle cycle could skip terminal if only UI labels are updated.
DOM classes could fail to include terminal while state persists correctly.
Theme picker UI could omit the fourth option.
Token coverage could miss filelist, upload, preview, settings, or trash surfaces.
